title: GPT 5.6 banned, Fable banned… it’s actually over.
summary: David Ondrej claims that GPT 5.6 and Fable have been banned, suggesting significant disruption to the AI landscape. The video title frames this as marking an end to some era or capability in the field.
writeup: David Ondrej argues that two AI systems, GPT 5.6 and Fable, have been banned, presenting this as a sharp disruption to the current AI landscape. The framing connects the bans to questions of regulation and to world models as a class of capability. The central claim is that these restrictions mark the end of a particular era or capability in the field.
